join.createparticipant.description.vp: You must run an Onboarding Process (OP) to obtain a participant for this schema. Start the Onboarding Process by filling this form.
This schema lets issuers self-create their participant role.
This schema lets verifiers self-create their participant role.
join.egf.title: Ecosystem Governance Framework
join.egf.keypoints:
All participants must maintain valid professional licenses and certifications
Credential schemas must comply with healthcare data protection regulations (HIPAA, GDPR)
Annual audits required for all issuer and verifier participants
Minimum trust deposit of 100 VNA required for issuer roles
Dispute resolution process through ecosystem governance committee

dataview.cs.description: View and manage this Credential Schema
dataview.cs.fields.creator: Controller
dataview.cs.descriptions.issuerOnboardin: Defines how issuer participants are onboarded.
dataview.cs.descriptions.verifierOnboard: Defines how verifier participants are onboarded.
dataview.cs.descriptions.issuerGrantorVa: maximum number of days an issuer grantor validation can be valid for, in days. Use 0 so that validation never expires, or set a number of days lower than 3650. Example, if you want an onboarding process to be valid for one year so that applicant will have to renew the onboarding process each year, set this parameter to 365.
dataview.cs.descriptions.verifierGrantor: maximum number of days a verifier grantor validation can be valid for, in days. Use 0 so that validation never expires, or set a number of days lower than 3650. Example, if you want an onboarding process to be valid for one year so that applicant will have to renew the onboarding process each year, set this parameter to 365.
dataview.cs.descriptions.issuerValidatio: maximum number of days an issuer validation can be valid for, in days. Use 0 so that validation never expires, or set a number of days lower than 3650. Example, if you want an onboarding process to be valid for one year so that applicant will have to renew the onboarding process each year, set this parameter to 365.
dataview.cs.descriptions.verifierValidat: maximum number of days a verifier validation can be valid for, in days. Use 0 so that validation never expires, or set a number of days lower than 3650. Example, if you want an onboarding process to be valid for one year so that applicant will have to renew the onboarding process each year, set this parameter to 365.
dataview.cs.descriptions.holderValidatio: maximum number of days holder validation can be valid for, in days. Use 0 so that validation never expires, or set a number of days lower than 3650. Example, if you want an onboarding process to be valid for one year so that applicant will have to renew the onboarding process each year, set this parameter to 365.
